item.title: Slush fund
item.description: Michael Ramirez cartoon on Donald Trump's anti-weaponization fund.

item.title: Why Congo’s Ebola outbreak is far more alarming than hantavirus
item.description: The world has been fixated on the wrong public health crisis.

item.title: Burritos with a side of teen violence
item.description: The leading mayoral candidates are divided on curfews.

item.title: A crisis 90 miles offshore should spur U.S. business leaders to action
item.description: Americans can help alleviate the suffering of the Cuban people without aiding their government.

item.title: Trump’s unhealthy grip on the stock market is now in writing
item.description: A new study shows Trump is driving the best and worst trading days. That’s not good.

item.title: How to get the most out of AI talks with China
item.description: Dialogue with rivals can be helpful, but plenty of traps lay ahead.

item.title: Is France poorer than America? You don’t have to ‘walk around’ to know.
item.description: Europe’s way of life would decline if America slowed down.

item.title: What jobs will AI destroy? Exhibit A shouldn’t be on the list.
item.description: The legal profession is changing, but the lawyer is here to stay.
